value.string: Highlighting a text inside the pdf and converting to word document
Assigning the path values to a string variable
Catches all the errors while executing the bot
Keyword search and highlighting inside the pdf
Select the file in which the text has to be highlighted
The output file is stored as _highlighted.pdf
Enter a text to be highlighted
Enter the text to be highlighted
Python script to be executed  for highlighting the keyword is stored as variable

value.expression:
import fitz
import sys
### READ IN PDF
doc = fitz.open("$inputPath$")
for page in doc:
    ### SEARCH
    text_instances = page.searchFor("$Keyword$")
    ### HIGHLIGHT
    for inst in text_instances:
        highlight = page.addHighlightAnnot(inst)
        highlight.update()
### OUTPUT
doc.save("$OutputFile$", garbage=4, deflate=True, clean=True)

value.string: The Python program is executed as single line execution
The pdf to word converted file is stored in .docx file
Python script to be executed for converting pdf to word is stored as variable

value.expression: from pdf2docx import parse\nparse(\"$OutputFile$\", \"$wordDoc$\", start=0, end=None)
